creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 232675
emulators/fceux: update to 2.6.4

Upstream changes:

 - Fixed crash that sometimes occurs when cancelling a key mapping
   sub-dialog for virtual family keyboard window
 - Fixed mapper combo box indexing issue.

Changelog:	https://fceux.com/web/pressrelease-2.6.4.html

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.
